seo.title: Krishan Mohan — Senior Software Engineer at McKinsey | Frontend Architect
seo.description: Professional portfolio of Krishan Mohan — Senior Software Engineer at McKinsey & Company in Gurugram, India, with 10+ years building enterprise web products for McKinsey, BlackRock, and global brands. React, Next.js, Python, FastAPI, AI engineering, and frontend architecture.
seo.ogAlt: Krishan Mohan — Senior Software Engineer at McKinsey & Company. React, Next.js, Python, FastAPI, and AI-powered product engineering.

person.name: Krishan Mohan
person.professionalHeadline: Senior Software Engineer · McKinsey & Company · India
person.tagline: Senior Software Engineer at McKinsey & Company in Gurugram, India — building pricing, analytics, and AI-powered products for global enterprises.
person.photoAlt: Krishan Mohan — Senior Software Engineer at McKinsey & Company

faqs.a: He is a Senior Software Engineer at McKinsey & Company in Gurugram, India, where he architects full-stack systems for pricing and analytics platforms used by global enterprise clients. Over 10+ years, he has built web products across consulting, finance, media, and e-commerce — from India to Europe and the US.

faqs.q: How much experience does he have?
faqs.a: Over 10 years building production web products for companies including McKinsey & Company, Preqin (now part of BlackRock), Publicis Sapient, and Arts Consolidated in Denmark. He is currently a Senior Software Engineer at McKinsey, working on pricing and analytics platforms for global enterprise clients.

faqs.q: What kind of results has he delivered?
faqs.a: At Operabase, he drove 30% revenue growth through SEO, paywall redesign, and better onboarding across 130+ countries — plus 20% faster product decisions via analytics dashboards. At Preqin (BlackRock), he led a full platform rebuild used by thousands of institutional investors. At McKinsey, he builds enterprise pricing tools and previously delivered credit analysis products for major banking engagements.

faqs.q: Does he work with international teams?
faqs.a: Yes. He is based in Gurugram, India and has collaborated with teams in Denmark, the US, and across Europe and Asia — including remote work at Arts Consolidated (Operabase) and enterprise delivery at McKinsey and BlackRock.

faqs.q: What technologies does he specialize in?
faqs.a: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, FastAPI, GraphQL, micro-frontends, and AI-assisted product engineering. He uses Python and FastAPI daily for APIs and backend services. He also focuses on Core Web Vitals, WCAG accessibility, and spec-driven delivery workflows.

faqs.q: Does he use AI in his work?
faqs.a: Yes — thoughtfully. He uses AI tools to speed up development and testing, but always reviews the output carefully. The goal is faster delivery without sacrificing quality.

boot.intro: I build fast, reliable web products for global companies — from e-commerce and finance to consulting and media. Based in Gurugram, India, I use Python and FastAPI daily for APIs and backend services, alongside React and Next.js on the frontend. Today at McKinsey & Company, I use modern tech plus AI to deliver more, without cutting corners.
boot.tagline: Based in Gurugram, India. Trusted by teams at McKinsey, BlackRock, and global brands.

items.title: Revenue growth through product improvements
items.description: Led frontend for Operabase — the world's leading opera platform used in 130+ countries. Improved SEO, redesigned the paywall and onboarding, and integrated secure payments to grow revenue significantly.
highlights: Redesigned registration and onboarding — higher activation across international markets
Built secure paywall with Stripe and Chargebee — reduced subscription churn
Added fingerprint-based session validation for account protection
Expanded globally with multi-language localization (Lokalise)
Improved site speed and Core Web Vitals through SSR and code-splitting

items.title: Better product decisions with real-time analytics
items.description: Built analytics dashboards connecting Google Analytics and Metabase so product and leadership teams could see what was working — and act on it faster.
highlights: Real-time dashboards for product and business teams
Data-driven decisions on SEO, paywall, and user flows
Shared component library serving both Operabase and CueTV

items.title: Led micro-frontend migration at Preqin (BlackRock)
items.description: Migrated a legacy monolithic frontend to a modern React micro-frontend architecture — enabling independent deployments across multiple product teams at a global alternative-assets data company.
highlights: Built Deals, Fundraising, and ESG dashboards used by thousands of institutional investors
Established a shared UI library and design tokens across applications
Integrated GraphQL and Redux Toolkit for real-time KPI visualizations
Faster release cycles and independent team deployments

items.title: Pricing platform for a global technology client
items.description: Architecting full-stack delivery for a pricing and discount optimization platform that powers large-scale B2B and B2C decisions for a leading global technology company.
highlights: Complex pricing workflows and discount simulations at enterprise scale
Python and FastAPI APIs for pricing logic, integrations, and data services — used daily
AI-powered features — natural-language queries and ML-driven recommendations in the UI
Analytics dashboards connected to Apache Spark and data lake pipelines
WCAG 2.1 accessibility and Core Web Vitals targets on all customer-facing surfaces
Pioneering AI-assisted delivery — shipping faster while maintaining production quality

items.title: Credit analysis & data tools for McKinsey banking clients
items.description: Built internal banking products including a Credit Bureau Analyzer that ingests and analyzes credit reports for underwriting — plus centralized data lake interfaces for customer and transactional insights.
highlights: Credit Bureau Analyzer supporting underwriting and risk assessment workflows
Centralized data lake UI consolidating customer, transaction, and credit data
Reusable React component libraries across multiple banking products
Full-stack delivery with Node.js (Hapi.js) and MySQL where needed

items.title: Enterprise e-commerce for global clients
items.description: Delivered large-scale digital experiences for Fortune 500 clients including Keurig — responsive e-commerce supporting 60+ brands with performance optimization and modern React architecture.
highlights: Responsive applications with React, Redux, and Webpack
Code-splitting and lazy loading for faster page loads
Mentored junior developers on React best practices

items.title: Founding frontend engineer — Rent It Bae
items.description: Owned end-to-end frontend for Rent It Bae, a premium fashion rental platform, during its founding phase — catalog, search, booking, payments, and order management across Indian cities.
highlights: Full e-commerce flows built from scratch
Rent It Bae later acquired competitor Flyrobe (2019)
Featured on Shark Tank India — Season 3 (2024)

items.title: Faster delivery with AI-assisted engineering
items.description: Developed a plan-first workflow using AI tools (Cursor, Claude, Spec-Kit) that speeds up feature delivery while keeping code quality and test coverage high — without cutting corners on review and testing.
highlights: Clear specifications before any code is written
AI drafts implementation — engineer reviews every change
Consistent quality at significantly higher velocity

chapters.label: The start
chapters.title: Where it all began.
paragraphs: In New Delhi, I joined Pronto IT Labs and helped build Rent It Bae — a fashion rental platform — from the ground up. Catalog, search, booking, payments. Everything a customer sees and clicks.
That is where I learned the craft: how to turn ideas into products people actually use.

chapters.label: Growing
chapters.title: Six years of building for big companies.
paragraphs: At Publicis Sapient, I built digital experiences for global brands like Keurig. At McKinsey, I worked on banking tools — credit analysis, data dashboards, and internal products used by teams every day.
At Preqin (now part of BlackRock), I spent two years rebuilding a large financial platform into a modern, modular system — dashboards for deals, fundraising, and ESG used by investors worldwide.
I learned that great products are not just about code. They are about clarity, speed, and trust.

chapters.label: A shift
chapters.title: When AI changed how we build.
paragraphs: When ChatGPT and Copilot arrived, I was skeptical. I had spent years mastering my craft the hard way.
Then I watched a teammate finish in hours what used to take days — with the same quality. That got my attention.
I started experimenting seriously. Not to replace thinking, but to remove the busywork and focus on what matters.

lines.text: It is a lever — if you know where to pull.

chapters.label: A new way
chapters.title: Working smarter, not just harder.
paragraphs: I rebuilt how I work. Instead of writing every line by hand, I write a clear plan first — what the feature should do, how it should behave, what success looks like.
Then I use AI tools to draft the implementation. I review everything carefully, test it, and refine until it is right.
The result: I ship faster, with fewer mistakes, and spend more time on architecture and user experience — the parts that actually matter.

chapters.label: My method
chapters.title: How I deliver every project.
paragraphs: Every feature goes through the same five steps: understand the goal, write a clear plan, build with AI assistance, test thoroughly, and ship.
This keeps projects predictable for clients and high-quality for users. No surprises, no shortcuts on what matters.

chapters.label: Tools
chapters.title: The tools behind the work.
paragraphs: I use the best tool for each job — Python and FastAPI daily for APIs and backend work, React and Next.js for the product UI, AI assistants for drafting code, and AWS for reliability.
The tools change. The standard does not: fast, accessible, and built to last.

chapters.label: Today
chapters.title: Building at McKinsey.
paragraphs: I am a Senior Software Engineer at McKinsey & Company in Gurugram, working on pricing and discount optimization platforms for global enterprise clients.

I build APIs and backend services with Python and FastAPI every day, and design the React interfaces for complex pricing workflows, analytics dashboards, and AI-powered features that help business teams make better decisions faster.
It is the most demanding work I have done — and the kind of problem I love solving.

specWorkflow.heading: My delivery process
specWorkflow.description: A simple, repeatable process that keeps projects on track and quality high.

steps.name: Understand
steps.desc: Clarify the goal, the users, and what success looks like. No building until everyone agrees.

steps.name: Plan
steps.desc: Write a clear specification — what to build, edge cases, and how we will know it works.

steps.name: Build
steps.desc: Implement using modern tools and AI assistance. Move fast, but never skip the details.

steps.name: Test
steps.desc: Check every flow, fix issues, and make sure it works on all devices and browsers.

steps.name: Ship
steps.desc: Deploy, monitor, and learn. Every project makes the next one better.

timeline.event: UI Developer · Pronto IT Labs (Rent It Bae) · New Delhi, India
Senior Associate · Publicis Sapient · Noida, India — global brand e-commerce
Senior Frontend Developer · McKinsey & Company · Bengaluru, India — banking & credit tools
Senior Engineer · Preqin (BlackRock) · Bengaluru, India — investor dashboards
Senior Frontend Developer · Arts Consolidated (Operabase) · Denmark · Remote — +30% revenue growth
Started using AI tools seriously in daily development
Senior Software Engineer · McKinsey & Company · Gurugram, India

services.title: Enterprise Web Products
services.desc: Customer-facing and internal applications with React and Next.js — backed by Python and FastAPI APIs, scalable, accessible, and built for long-term maintainability.

services.title: AI-Powered Product Features
services.desc: Natural-language interfaces, smart search, and ML-driven recommendations integrated into production web applications.

services.title: Frontend Architecture
services.desc: Micro-frontends, design systems, and modular platforms that support multiple teams and products at scale.

services.title: Performance & Accessibility
services.desc: Core Web Vitals optimization, SSR, code-splitting, and WCAG 2.1 compliance for enterprise-grade user experiences.

services.title: Spec-Driven Delivery
services.desc: Plan-first engineering workflows using AI-assisted development — faster delivery with rigorous review and testing.

services.title: Technical Leadership
services.desc: Architecture reviews, mentoring, and cross-team alignment for complex frontend and full-stack initiatives — including Python, FastAPI, and React systems.
